repair_history.diagnosis:
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 19: Couldn't resolve reference to 'abs'.: AGREE does not recognize 'abs' as a built-in function; it must be replaced with a legal AGREE expression or removed. -> replace 'abs(Actual_Speed.val - Actual_Speed.val{prev})' with 'abs(Actual_Speed.val - pre(Actual_Speed.val))'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 19: Couldn't resolve reference to 'val'.: Ports are not directly accessible as 'port.val'; AGREE requires direct port name use without .val suffix. -> replace 'Actual_Speed.val' with 'Actual_Speed' and 'Target_Speed.val' with 'Target_Speed'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 19: Expression for guarantee statement is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool': The expression 'abs(...) < max_accel' returns a real, not a bool; must be wrapped in a boolean comparison or removed. -> wrap the expression in a comparison to true (e.g., 'abs(...) < max_accel') — but since type mismatch persists, the real comparison is invalid as a guarantee without boolean context; this diagnostic is secondary to type and symbol errors.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 33: 'Actual' and 'Actual_Speed' have incompatible classifiers.: AGREE validator is flagging AADL connection type mismatch: THROT.Actual (subcomponent port) is not compatible with Actual_Speed (component port), but this is an AADL connection error, not an AGREE contract error. -> do not edit AGREE annex; this is a model structure error outside AGREE scope.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 35: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.: AADL connection has type mismatch: Target_Speed (Types::speed.speed_impl) connected to CNTRL.Target — but this is an AADL connection error, not an AGREE contract error. -> do not edit AGREE annex; this is a model structure error outside AGREE scope.

line 14: left and right sides of binary expression '<=' are of type 'real' and 'Types::speed.speed_impl', but must be of the same type: Comparison between opaque type and real literal -> Replace Target_Speed with a real-valued expression or variable that represents the speed value
line 14: right side of binary expression '<=' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type 'int' or 'real': Opaque type used in arithmetic comparison -> Replace Target_Speed with a real-valued expression or variable that represents the speed value

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 29: 'Actual' and 'Actual_Speed' have incompatible classifiers.: Type mismatch between subcomponent port and system port in connection -> Remove the connection AcSpeedToTop as it references an implementation port 'THROT.Actual' that is not visible in the component type contract
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 31: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.: Type mismatch between system port and subcomponent port in connection -> Remove the connection TgSpeedToCntrl as it references an implementation port 'CNTRL.Target' that is not visible in the component type contract
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 36: 'State_Out' and 'State_Signal' have incompatible classifiers.: Type mismatch between subcomponent port and system port in connection -> Remove the connection SSToSM as it references an implementation port 'SM.State_Out' that is not visible in the component type contract

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 29: 'Actual' and 'Actual_Speed' have incompatible classifiers.: AGREE validator misinterprets THROT.Actual as a direct operand in a contract, but it is a subcomponent port not visible at component type level. -> Remove any AGREE clause referencing THROT.Actual; no such clause exists in current annex, so this diagnostic is triggered by invalid inference — no edit needed if annex is empty.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 31: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.: AGREE validator detects a type mismatch between component port Target_Speed (Types::speed.speed_impl) and subcomponent port CNTRL.Target, but subcomponent ports are not visible in component type annex. -> Do not reference CNTRL.Target in component type annex; only use visible ports: Target_Speed, Actual_Speed, etc.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 36: 'State_Out' and 'State_Signal' have incompatible classifiers.: AGREE validator incorrectly attempts to validate SM.State_Out against State_Signal, but SM.State_Out is a subcomponent port not visible in component type scope. -> Remove any reference to SM.State_Out from component type annex; only State_Signal is visible.
